name: Simple, cross-attention probe
long_description:
SEED = 42
NUM_EPOCHS = 50

BATCH_SIZE = 64
NUM_WORKERS = 4
PREFETCH_FACTOR = 2
PIN_MEMORY = True

INPUT_DIM = 2560
MODEL_DIM = 256
NUM_HEADS = 8
RESPONSE_SELF_ATTENTION_LAYERS = 1
FEEDFORWARD_DIM = 1024
DROPOUT = 0.2
NUM_CLASSES = 6
MAX_RESPONSE_LENGTH = 512
MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS = 512

LEARNING_RATE = 3e-4
WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-2
MAX_GRAD_NORM = 1.0
CLASS_WEIGHTS = torch.tensor([1.0, 2.5, 3.7, 10.0, 8.0, 5.9], dtype=torch.float32)

LR_SCHEDULER_FACTOR = 0.5
LR_SCHEDULER_PATIENCE = 2
MIN_LEARNING_RATE = 1e-6
EARLY_STOPPING_PATIENCE = 6
EARLY_STOPPING_MIN_DELTA = 1e-4
